description_long: This is a life-sized, anatomically accurate model of a horse with a solid, muscular build and a smooth, glossy black coat. The horse's head is slightly turned, with well-defined ears, nostrils, and a prominent jawline. Its mane is sculpted to appear thick and slightly wavy, lying mostly to one side of the neck. The tail is long and textured, hanging naturally down to the hocks. The legs are sturdy and proportionate, with visible musculature and realistic hoof shapes. There is no visible tack or equipment, and the horse stands in a relaxed, attentive posture.
description: A realistic, glossy black horse with a thick mane and natural stance, featuring detailed musculature and no visible tack.
description_view_0: Front three-quarter view showing the horse's head, chest, and left side, highlighting the facial features and muscular neck.
description_view_1: Left side view emphasizing the length of the body, the flow of the mane, and the natural fall of the tail.
description_view_2: Rear three-quarter view displaying the hindquarters, tail texture, and the back of the legs.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the curvature of the body, the right legs, and the mane's placement.
attribute_pose: Standing square with a relaxed, attentive posture.
attribute_mane_style: The mane is thick, slightly wavy, and lies loosely to one side of the neck.
attribute_leg_position: All four legs are on the ground, bearing weight evenly in a natural stance.
